steps.title: Identify the starting price
steps.content: The smartphone originally retailed for $720$, so the payment starts from $720$ before subtracting any yearly decrease.

steps.title: Subtract by years
steps.content:
The company subtracts $145$ for each year since release. For $t$ years, the total subtracted amount is $145t$, so
$$p=720-145t$$
The answer is B.
